message: Hey team!:rocket: Can you believe it's been 8 fantastic years for Online Boutique?
Before we dive into anniversary celebrations let's give a warm welcome to Maya our new Security Analyst. She's got 5 years of cybersecurity expertise under her belt! :clap:
Hi everyone! :raised_hand_with_fingers_splayed: Thrilled to be here especially on such a special occasion. Let's make Online Boutique even successful and secure together!
Welcome Maya! Your experience will elevate our cybersecurity efforts.
Excited to have you Maya! Bez has been very excited to have you on the team.
Impressive! Eager to learn from you Maya.
:+1: Welcome Maya pleasure meeting you.
Hi Maya! Your experience is top-notch. Cheers to you and to Online Boutique's 8-year anniversary! :partying_face: :tada:
Thanks for the warm welcome! Excited for the celebration and our anniversary party.
Clicked Start button
We are all so glad you have joined us Maya
Hold on team. Quick check-in. Is anyone else experiencing internet problems or slow connectivity?
Internet's definitely sluggish was loading up github and it took ages to load
Perhaps it could be due to the increase of sales we have been having with this anniversary sale?
Hey team we've seen some weird traffic from our data centre network in the last couple of days it's been mostly minor but never as bad compared to now although
Hamed and I will have been monitoring outbound traffic. Checking for anomalies again.
I will try to place an order and check the platform.
Just ran a test on my internet speed.
Internet Speed Test
What's our usual Shay
Bob Are we seeing any customer issues from this?
Atleast above 150 Mbps
Let me check this with my team
Some customers are placing orders without issues while others report long load times
Internet speed problems sev-3
*Incident Number INC100040:* Internet speed problems sev-3
Issues reported by customers are widespread not limited to any specific region
Ah okay thanks bob let's raise that to sev-2 then
For me i'm not able to open up git youtube . Everything feels slow
Let's raise that to sev-2 seems there are several customers reporting issues
How many customers have reported this issue so far ?
Tanya what did you find in the traffic logs?
Daniel Were you able to place an order?
Let me check the networks
For me i am able to place orders
Bob How many reports have we had so far?
So far we have got 60+ reports
Daniel Have you done a speed test your end? Are you seeing any issues? Is it limited?
60+ reports hence sev-2
My speed test shows 257 Mbps of speed
For me its loading slowly
Shay I doubt it's anything to do with this but have you got our most recent change log
Maya Is there any chance we could be under attack right now?
Here are the list of changes : <https://uptime-labs.atlassian.net/wiki/external/NGRkNTNhZDVjZDUyNDU5NDk2Yjg3NzcxMTE1YjkxOTA>
Daniel Can you look through the logs and see if you can find anything unusual
Let me check.
There is a spike in outbound connections in the edge router and the origin IP block 10.50.0.0/24. That IP range is the same as the IP block the frontend and payments are hosted on
Tanya What might that mean? Do we know where the connections are going to?
This is very unusual. Lets see what Maya finds
In the logs i'm seeing timeouts in frontend app
Security scan shows issues related to our network switch. Working on identifying the exact cause
Which lines up with the spike in connections
Thanks Maya keep looking get back to me in the next 2 mins
Is there any support you need from us Maya?
But the orders are still coming in. So i doubt its something to do with the changes
Need Hamed with me
Yeah you're right Daniel and the changes do not line up was just ruling things out
Hamed S Can you help Maya please
Have we identified where exactly is the issue?
Bob Hows the customer reports looking
I'll assist Maya
140+ reports so far
What shall i convey to customers ?
We've identified a spike in outbound connections in the edge router. We're now trying to identify if there's a security issue or DDOS attack that is causing this
Why there are so many outbound connections
Bob What's that as a percentage of customers?

Our investigation uncovered a critical issue: the network switch was compromised due to unpatched vulnerabilities. We have identified a BotNet in the switch and it's creating outbound connections to the outside
Found a critical issue. Our network switch was compromised due to unpatched vulnerabilities leading to a BotNet creating DDOS attacks
Hamed S Maya What can we do?
The network switch's vulnerabilities were exploited. We need to address this immediately
Maya What's the next steps
We can try to do a restart
Patch it?
@david.knapman064 what do you say ?
Tanya What would a restart do?
Connections would drop
Suggesting a switch restart. Though I'm not sure
Let's try the restart see if that fixes things
Hang on!! Restart isn't advisable
Why Hamed S?
In case of DDoS it might not work
Because the code will still be there?
Hamed S Any other suggestions?
Switch is still exploited
Your right restarting the switch isnt the best option as it might intruduce some more issues
Trying to think of another solution but i'm not too familiar with the network infrastructure here at OB
No worries Maya I can send over the graph of the network infra if you wanna look at it
That would be perfect @hamed
Network Diagram
Looking at the diagram now will need a moment to figure out what to do next
Let me know if you have any suggestions in the mean time
Whats the current status ? So you think it could resolved in next 5 mins ?
Tinus Any other suggestions we haven't thought of?
Looking through the graph
We have a redundant switch
Yes we can failover to that switch
We've identified a security vulnerability in the network switch which has allowed  a botnet to run on the switch. We're now identify the next steps to try and resolve this
Then lets do that Hamed S
But before that i'll isolate the affected switch
Good shout Maya
Also is the failover switch patched? Maya
I'm isolating the switch now
There will be a slight downtime
Hamed S is the redundant switch patched?
Isolation done
We don't want the same issue to come back when we fail over
We're working on a fix now should be in the next 5-10 mins
You're right i did it now
ok lets switch over to failover switch now
Doing it
Alright Maya when you're ready switch over
Whats the ETA ?
We're switching over to the redundant switch now we'll know if it's worked in the next couple of mins
the infected switch has been successfully changed over
The Catalyst 9300 Series which is our infected switch has been swapped over to old but reliable (Cisco Catalyst 2960 Series)
Perfect thank you
Good job can we confirm @david.knapman064?
Bob Can you monitor customer reports?
Shay Can you check your internet speed
Few customers did complaint about the downtime. Was it expected ?
Daniel Can you check the logs and see if the frontend is working more reliably now
No new reports in last minute
Bob yeah the downtime was due to the switchover
Yes the frontend logs are healthy now
Shay Anything?
My internet is upto speed now
I think we can probably mark this resolved
Thanks team great job everyone
Cheers everyone! Resolving these network issues added a bit of spice to our celebration
Good job team! We managed to keep the anniversary vibe alive despite the detour.
High-fives all around!  I will take out that faulty switch as soon as possible.
The website's performance is looking solid again
The anniversary orders are flowing smoothly now. No hiccups on the code side.
Switchover worked correctly there was minimal downtime but we're now back to normal
Our customers are back to enjoying the celebration. Happy customers happy anniversary!
Really great job @david.knapman064.
Special congratulations to our Incident Manager for steering the ship with finesse and to Maya for your help identifying the faulty switch. Cheers to a remarkable team! :tada:
The infected switch has been isolated
Great @david.knapman064
Clicked Start_feedback button\n
